name: Green Tomato & Apple Chutney #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut green tomatoes into thin slices (6 cups).
2. Place in a large shallow dish and sprinkle with salt. Cover with plastic wrap and leave overnight.
3. Drain off any liquid from the tomatoes and place them in a large saucepan.
4. Add chopped onions, apples, vinegar, brown sugar, raisins, dates, and ginger.
5. Tie pickling spices in a piece of cheesecloth. Add to the tomato mixture.
6. Stir all ingredients to mix well.
7. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until thickened to the desired consistency, stirring occasionally. This will take about 1 1/2 hours.
8. Discard the spice bag.
9. Ladle chutney into hot half-pint jars, leaving 1/2-inch headspace.
10. Wipe rims clean. Adjust lids according to manufacturer's directions and process in boiling water bath for 10 minutes. Makes about 11 cups.
